artifact: P134 64-frame raw-vs-masked DROID-SLAM global BA metrics
scope: 64-frame bounded TorWIC Aisle_CW_Run_1 window, DROID-SLAM with global BA enabled, Sim(3) alignment and scale correction in evo.
claim_boundary: This proves a larger bounded DROID-SLAM raw-vs-masked backend run with global BA is executable. It does not prove masked input improves full-trajectory SLAM, map quality, or navigation.

inputs.masked_policy: Only frame 000002 has the forklift semantic mask; other frames have empty masks.

interpretation: Raw and masked trajectories are effectively tied on this 64-frame bounded global-BA run. The single-frame dynamic mask has negligible effect at this window scale.
